description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

【Hanno City Lifelong Learning Festival 2025 — Event Report】

Held on Saturday, February 21, 2026 (Reiwa 8), 10:00–15:00 at Hanno City Civic Hall and Hanno Central Park. The festival served as a venue for citizens to display and share their learning activities and promote community programs. Many visitors of all ages attended.

Courses offered:
• "Beginner's Guide to Enjoying Low-Mountain Hiking!! Exploring Tenranzan and Hanno's Mountains"
• "Learning Together: Money Matters for Kids and Adults"

Experience booths:
• Brain training games
• Hinoki wood spinning tops and magnetic crafts
• Traditional festival music (hayashi) experience
• Mock performances by the Local Performing Arts Preservation Society
• Museum exhibits and guides
• Foster care system awareness display
• Go (board game) experience
• Slime-making
• Hockey experience
• Mölkky (throwing game) experience

Food and drink vendors also participated.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kyoikubu/syogaigakusyu-sports/shogaigakushu/11259.html
summary: ℹ️ Hanno City held its 2025 Lifelong Learning Festival
